title: Nginx Maintenance Mode Example
summary: Serve a maintenance page from Nginx.
verification_setup: Install Nginx on a staging host.
Put a real maintenance.html file under the configured root path before validation.
Ensure the Nginx worker user and any host security policy can read the configured directory before validation.
Add any required health-check or ACME exceptions before validation.
verification_command: Manual verification only; see README.md for the staging checklist.
verification_notes: Not executed. The example uses the official Nginx return, error_page, and internal directives, but it still requires nginx -t and a real maintenance page on a staging host before use.
